headline: Builders FirstSource Announces COO and CHRO Succession Plan
summary: IRVING, Texas, May 18, 2026--Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) announced today that as part of a planned leadership transition, Mike Hiller has been appointed Chief Operating Officer-Designate, succeeding Steve Herron, who will retire on December 31, 2026.

headline: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Builders FirstSource (BLDR) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.
